name: tech-priests
title: Tech Priests
author: christopher vardeman
description: Tech-Priest logistics drones, Cogitator Stations, Work State tabs, Machine-Spirit ledger traits, emergency machinery, construction placement authority, active leaf task truth, visual intent lines, mineable crash-wreck salvage, and 0.1.658 nearby inventory scavenge authority so needed items are physically looted from nearby real inventories before mining or fabrication.
